subcodes.first_line: O Son of My Name, O Husayn! Upon thee be My glory and My loving-kindness. The letter, whose sender was 'Inayatu'llah [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا ابن اسمی یا حسین علیکما بهائی و عنایتی نامه که مرسل آن عنایت الله بوده
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for protection, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @prayer for the spiritual progress of others, @praise and encouragement, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
